label: Sinai Syriac NF M 38, Undertext (Christian Palestinian Aramaic)

bib.citation: Lewis, Agnes Smith. Codex Climaci Rescriptus. Horae Semiticae 8 (Cambridge: Raritas, 1909)

Müller-Kessler, Christa, and Michael Sokoloff. The Christian Palestinian Aramaic New Testament Version from the Early Period: Gospels. A corpus of Christian Palestinian Aramaic. Vol. 2B. Groningen: STYX Publishers, 1998

Desreumaux, Alain. "Les manuscrits araméens christo-palestiniens du nouveau fonds du monastère de Sainte-Catherine du Sinaï." Comptes rendus des séances de l'Académie des Inscriptions et Belles-Lettres 154 (2010): 1317-1328
Brock, Sebastian P. “Ktabe Mpassqe: Dismembered and Reconstituted Syriac and Christian Palestinian Aramaic Manuscripts: Some Examples, Ancient and Modern.” Hugoye: Journal of Syriac Studies 15 (2012)
Géhin, Paul. Les manuscrits syriaques de parchemin du Sinaï et leurs membra disjecta, CSCO 665. Louvain: Peeters, 2017

Müller-Kessler, Christa. "The Missing Quire of Codex Climaci Rescriptus Containing 1–2 Corinthians in Christian Palestinian Aramaic (Sin., Syr. NF M38).” In New Light on Old Manuscripts: Recent Advances in Palimpsest Studies, eds. C. Rapp, G. Rossetto, J. Grusková, G. Kessel. Wien: ÖAW, 2023

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025.
